set(APP_MODULE_HEADER_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/include/generated")
set(APP_MODULE_HEADER "${APP_MODULE_HEADER_DIR}/app_modules.h")
file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${APP_MODULE_HEADER_DIR}")
file(WRITE "${APP_MODULE_HEADER}"
    "/** Automatically generated from module manifests. Do not edit. */\n"
    "#ifndef APP_MODULES_H\n#define APP_MODULES_H\n\n"
)

function(read_module_manifest manifest mode)
    file(STRINGS "${manifest}" manifest_lines ENCODING UTF-8)
    unset(module_name)
    unset(module_id)
    unset(module_config)
    unset(module_prompt)
    unset(module_default)
    unset(module_sources)
    unset(module_depends)
	set(allowed_fields name id config prompt default sources depends)

    foreach(line IN LISTS manifest_lines)
        string(STRIP "${line}" line)
        if(line STREQUAL "" OR line MATCHES "^#")
            continue()
        endif()
        if(NOT line MATCHES "^([a-z_]+)=(.*)$")
            message(FATAL_ERROR "Invalid module manifest line in ${manifest}: ${line}")
        endif()
		set(field_name "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
		list(FIND allowed_fields "${field_name}" field_index)
		if(field_index EQUAL -1)
			message(FATAL_ERROR "Unknown field '${field_name}' in ${manifest}")
		endif()
		if(DEFINED module_${field_name})
			message(FATAL_ERROR "Duplicate field '${field_name}' in ${manifest}")
		endif()
		set("module_${field_name}" "${CMAKE_MATCH_2}")
    endforeach()

    foreach(required_field name id config prompt default sources)
        if(NOT DEFINED module_${required_field})
            message(FATAL_ERROR "Missing '${required_field}' in ${manifest}")
        endif()
    endforeach()
	if(NOT module_name MATCHES "^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$")
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Invalid module name '${module_name}' in ${manifest}")
	endif()
	if(NOT module_config MATCHES "^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$")
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Invalid config name '${module_config}' in ${manifest}")
	endif()
	if(NOT module_id MATCHES "^(0[xX][0-9A-Fa-f]+|[1-9][0-9]*)$")
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Invalid module id '${module_id}' in ${manifest}")
	endif()
	math(EXPR module_id_value "${module_id}")
	if(module_id_value LESS 1 OR module_id_value GREATER 4294967295)
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Module id '${module_id}' is outside uint32 range in ${manifest}")
	endif()
	string(TOLOWER "${module_default}" module_default_lower)
	if(NOT module_default_lower STREQUAL "y" AND NOT module_default_lower STREQUAL "n")
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Module default must be y or n in ${manifest}")
	endif()
	if(module_prompt STREQUAL "" OR module_sources STREQUAL "")
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Module prompt and sources must not be empty in ${manifest}")
	endif()

	get_filename_component(manifest_dir "${manifest}" DIRECTORY)
	string(REPLACE "," ";" source_files "${module_sources}")
	foreach(source_file IN LISTS source_files)
		string(STRIP "${source_file}" source_file)
		if(source_file STREQUAL "" OR IS_ABSOLUTE "${source_file}" OR source_file MATCHES "(^|/)\\.\\.(/|$)")
			message(FATAL_ERROR "Unsafe source path '${source_file}' in ${manifest}")
		endif()
		if(NOT EXISTS "${manifest_dir}/${source_file}")
			message(FATAL_ERROR "Module source '${source_file}' does not exist for ${manifest}")
		endif()
	endforeach()

    string(TOUPPER "${module_name}" module_name_upper)
    set(config_variable "CONFIG_${module_config}")
    if(mode STREQUAL "DECLARE")
        get_property(known_ids GLOBAL PROPERTY APP_MODULE_IDS)
        get_property(known_names GLOBAL PROPERTY APP_MODULE_NAMES)
		get_property(known_configs GLOBAL PROPERTY APP_MODULE_CONFIGS)
		list(FIND known_ids "${module_id_value}" duplicate_id_index)
        list(FIND known_names "${module_name_upper}" duplicate_name_index)
		list(FIND known_configs "${module_config}" duplicate_config_index)
        if(NOT duplicate_id_index EQUAL -1)
            message(FATAL_ERROR "Duplicate module id ${module_id} in ${manifest}")
        endif()
        if(NOT duplicate_name_index EQUAL -1)
            message(FATAL_ERROR "Duplicate module name ${module_name} in ${manifest}")
        endif()
		if(NOT duplicate_config_index EQUAL -1)
			message(FATAL_ERROR "Duplicate module config ${module_config} in ${manifest}")
		endif()
		set_property(GLOBAL APPEND PROPERTY APP_MODULE_IDS "${module_id_value}")
        set_property(GLOBAL APPEND PROPERTY APP_MODULE_NAMES "${module_name_upper}")
		set_property(GLOBAL APPEND PROPERTY APP_MODULE_CONFIGS "${module_config}")
		set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY "APP_MODULE_DEPENDS_${module_config}" "${module_depends}")

        if(module_default_lower STREQUAL "y")
            set(default_value ON)
        else()
            set(default_value OFF)
        endif()
        option(${config_variable} "${module_prompt}" ${default_value})
        file(APPEND "${APP_MODULE_HEADER}" "#define SYS_MOD_${module_name_upper} ${module_id}U\n")
        return()
    endif()

    if(NOT ${config_variable})
        return()
    endif()
    if(DEFINED module_depends AND NOT module_depends STREQUAL "")
        string(REPLACE "," ";" dependencies "${module_depends}")
        foreach(dependency IN LISTS dependencies)
            string(STRIP "${dependency}" dependency)
			get_property(known_configs GLOBAL PROPERTY APP_MODULE_CONFIGS)
			list(FIND known_configs "${dependency}" dependency_index)
			if(dependency_index EQUAL -1)
				message(FATAL_ERROR "${config_variable} has unknown dependency CONFIG_${dependency}")
			endif()
            if(NOT CONFIG_${dependency})
                message(FATAL_ERROR "${config_variable} requires CONFIG_${dependency}")
            endif()
        endforeach()
    endif()

	if(TARGET app_core)
		foreach(source_file IN LISTS source_files)
			string(STRIP "${source_file}" source_file)
			target_sources(app_core PRIVATE "${manifest_dir}/${source_file}")
		endforeach()
	endif()
endfunction()

function(validate_module_dependencies config path)
	set(path_items ${path})
	list(FIND path_items "${config}" cycle_index)
	if(NOT cycle_index EQUAL -1)
		list(APPEND path_items "${config}")
		list(JOIN path_items " -> " cycle_text)
		message(FATAL_ERROR "Module dependency cycle: ${cycle_text}")
	endif()
	get_property(known_configs GLOBAL PROPERTY APP_MODULE_CONFIGS)
	get_property(dependencies GLOBAL PROPERTY "APP_MODULE_DEPENDS_${config}")
	string(REPLACE "," ";" dependencies "${dependencies}")
	list(APPEND path_items "${config}")
	foreach(dependency IN LISTS dependencies)
		string(STRIP "${dependency}" dependency)
		if(dependency STREQUAL "")
			continue()
		endif()
		list(FIND known_configs "${dependency}" dependency_index)
		if(dependency_index EQUAL -1)
			message(FATAL_ERROR "CONFIG_${config} has unknown dependency CONFIG_${dependency}")
		endif()
		validate_module_dependencies("${dependency}" "${path_items}")
	endforeach()
endfunction()

file(GLOB module_manifests CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.module")
if(NOT module_manifests)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "No module manifests found in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}")
endif()

foreach(manifest IN LISTS module_manifests)
    read_module_manifest("${manifest}" DECLARE)
endforeach()
get_property(module_configs GLOBAL PROPERTY APP_MODULE_CONFIGS)
foreach(module_config IN LISTS module_configs)
	validate_module_dependencies("${module_config}" "")
endforeach()
file(APPEND "${APP_MODULE_HEADER}" "\n#endif\n")

foreach(manifest IN LISTS module_manifests)
    read_module_manifest("${manifest}" BUILD)
endforeach()

add_library(app_module_config INTERFACE)
target_include_directories(app_module_config INTERFACE "${APP_MODULE_HEADER_DIR}")
if(TARGET app_core)
	target_link_libraries(app_core PRIVATE app_module_config)
	target_include_directories(app_core PRIVATE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}")
endif()
